title: Sales Operations Reporting & Analytics Specialist (m/w/d)
required_skills: 6+ years data analysis experience with analytical skills and commercial acumen
CRM systems and data analysis tools (Salesforce preferred)
Data visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI, or similar)
Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities
bonus_skills: Academic publishing or subscription-based business model experience
matched_skills: Dashboard building and reporting (HSBC budget variance dashboards, Minth executive dashboards)
missing_skills: MS Excel and PowerPoint (not explicitly stated in CV)
Data visualization tools (Tableau / Power BI — not listed)
6+ years of data analysis (CV shows 4+ years)
Academic publishing or subscription-based business model knowledge
core_responsibilities: Create and maintain report templates and dashboards for Senior VPs and high-level management
Research and analyse operational data to identify areas of improvement
Expand and manage financial reporting platforms (Salesforce, Data Studio, GBQ, SAP Query Designer, CRM Analytics)
Project manage deliverables against set timelines
Act as liaison between business and IT for change management and requirements translation
recommended_emphasis: Highlight dashboard and reporting work at HSBC (budget variance dashboards) and Minth (executive dashboards across 12 product lines)
Emphasise international experience spanning EMEA and APAC markets
Strengthen project management credentials referencing Hapag-Lloyd coordination role and HSBC USD 8M programme ownership
Add any Excel, Power BI, or Tableau usage to skills section if applicable
Quantify stakeholder seniority — position C-level storytelling experience against reporting to Senior VPs requirement
